atoms.content: A Machine Learning Engineer is a software developer who specializes in designing, building, and deploying machine learning models into production systems.
Imagine a chef who not only cooks the food (Data Scientist) but also builds the automated kitchen assembly line so millions can get the meal instantly. That's an ML Engineer.

1. Bridges the gap between Data Science and Software Engineering.
2. Focuses on scaling models.
3. Requires strong programming and infrastructure skills.
True or False: An ML Engineer's primary job is exclusively creating theoretical math algorithms, not writing code.
